height.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the select component for height.

radius.$description: M3 text-field container shape: md.sys.shape.corner.extra-small (4dp) via the material3 radius scale.

border-block-start-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the select component for border block start width.

border-inline-start-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the select component for border inline start width.

border-inline-end-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the select component for border inline end width.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for rest background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for rest foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for rest border.

label-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for rest label foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for hover background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for hover foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for hover border.

label-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for hover label foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for focus background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for focus foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for focus border.

label-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for focus label foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for disabled background.

fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for disabled foreground.

border.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for disabled border.

label-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for disabled label foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for placeholder foreground.

bg.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for listbox background.

radius.$description: M3 menu container shape: md.sys.shape.corner.extra-small (4dp) via the material3 radius scale.

elevation.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for listbox elevation.

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the select component for focus ring color.
